_capture.method: Polite minimal capture (dossier 3.12): honest User-Agent, paginated POST (limit=20), 2s delay between requests, one detail follow-up.
_capture.note: Path (c) of the Session-9 Part-2 plan: Citi (BB) early-careers Workday site citi.wd5 / site '2' (the site segment is literally '2'; front-end jobs.citi.com is Phenom over this Workday). searchText='Summer Analyst Program' is free-text (Citi exposes no dedicated early-careers facet; its jobFamilyGroup 'Management Development Programs' is BANAMEX retail-heavy, not IB analyst programmes). Like any Workday free-text search this raw response ALSO returns some lateral/VP roles where the words matched a description; UNLIKE the Barclays 'graduate' capture it genuinely SURFACES a multi-office early-careers programme: the 'Summer Analyst Program' spans Sydney, Melbourne, New York, Budapest, Tokyo, Dubai, Mississauga and Manila, and includes the same-region multi-office shape (Corporate Advisory Summer Analyst in BOTH Sydney and Melbourne -> both APAC). jobPostings aggregates the paginated listing pages VERBATIM; the listing is shallow (title/externalPath/locationsText/postedOn/bulletFields). example_detail is ONE verbatim per-posting follow-up (GET .../{externalPath}).

jobPostingInfo.title: Summer Analyst Program - Corporate Advisory - Summer Analyst, Sydney  Australia (APAC) - 2026
jobPostingInfo.jobDescription:
You're the brains behind our work!

You're ready to bring your knowledge from the classroom to the boardroom, and Citi wants to help you get there. Whether it's honing your skills or building your network. We know that success can't come without growth. Our summer internship programs equip you with the knowledge and training you need to play a valuable role on your team and establish a long-term career here. At Citi, we value internal mobility, and career growth is not a question of if, but when.

Citi’s Corporate Advisory division is a leading provider of financial services to top-tier multi-national clients around the globe, serving the financial needs of the world's preeminent corporations, governments and financial institutions.

Citi’s Summer Analyst Program is a 10-week program dedicated to giving future business leaders a complete view of Citi's Corporate Advisory business through hands-on experience:

  • Extensive training program to gain the fundamental skills of a Summer Analyst role

  • Assignments equivalent to full-time responsibilities

  • You will develop the core skills required of a full-time analyst and gain direct exposure on deals and transactions

Top performing Summer Analysts will be hired to join the following year’s Graduate Analyst Program in 2028.

We're looking for motivated individuals, who are eager to grow their careers in Corporate Advisory. Successful candidates take pride in all aspects of their work and recognize that it is a reflection not just of the firm; but of themselves. 

We want to hear from you if:

  • You're a penultimate or final year student with strong academic achievement in a wide variety of disciplines.

  • From Business to STEM, Arts and Law; we encourage you to find your fit.

  • You have demonstrated strong leadership; teamwork; and communication skills

  • Passionate about finance and have a genuine interest to learn

  • Enthusiasm for contributing to the Citi community; through teamwork; leadership; and mentoring 

  • Commitment to their own personal success and the success of the institution 

  • Ability to win and sustain the loyalty of institutional clients with confidence and good judgment. 

  • Intellectual curiosity and proactive approach to searching for new and creative ideas to implement innovative strategies.

Applications will only be accepted and reviewed if the below are included:

- Updated CV (including your ATAR/GPA/WAM)

- Cover letter addressed to Citi

- Academic Transcript

- ATAR score is required to be included in your CV or as a separate document

Applications are reviewed on a rolling basis; therefore, early application is highly encouraged!

Important: Applicants will only be considered if all above documents are included upon submission. Please upload your Resume, Cover Letter and Academic Transcript under the 'Resume/CV' document section in the application form.
